text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness me. What was that just now?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Why does it... feel like I've been enveloped in
warmth?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
How strange... There's power welling up from
deep inside of me, but I still feel so calm.
